user.title: Cast Metadata & TV Controls
user.description: Create one organized controller device for every physical TV, Chromecast, Cast speaker, or smart display.

abort.already_configured: Cast Metadata & TV Controls is already configured.

init.title: Physical device grouping
init.description: Automatic grouping uses device IDs, network connections, areas, and names. Add an explicit group only when Home Assistant represents one physical TV as multiple devices.

add_group.title: Combine source entities
add_group.description: Select every native media_player entity that represents the same physical television.

clear_groups.title: Clear all explicit groups
clear_groups.description: Automatic grouping will be used after the integration reloads.

error.two_entities_required: Select at least two different source entities.
